About Koru Homestay

Where Every Morning
Feels Like a Gift

Welcome to Koru Homestay — the most wonderful place you will ever wake up in Wayanad. Nestled in the serene surroundings of Chuzhaly, Kalpetta, our five-bedroom home is where luxury meets nature and every moment becomes a memory worth keeping forever.

From the moment you arrive, you will feel the difference. The fresh mountain air. The warm, smiling welcome. The feeling that this is exactly where you were meant to be.

Five Spacious Bedrooms
Fully Equipped Kitchen
LGBTQ+ Friendly
Free WiFi
Spacious Parking
Bonfire Nights

Accommodation

Your Home Away
From Home

Five beautifully appointed bedrooms, each designed to make you feel completely at ease in the heart of Wayanad.

Master Suite

The Forest Room

Wake up to sweeping green views in our largest bedroom. Spacious, airy, and filled with the gentle sounds of Wayanad mornings.

Common Area

The Living Lounge

A stunning double-height living room with a swing, TV lounge, and dining — the perfect space for families to gather and relax together.

Outdoor Space

The Sky Terrace

Play carrom under the open sky on our glass-roofed terrace with panoramic views of Kalpetta's lush green surroundings.

Experiences

Discover the Magic
of Wayanad

🔥

Bonfire Nights

Gather around a crackling bonfire under a sky full of stars. Share stories, laughter, and warmth with family and friends in our beautiful garden.

🌿

Nature Walks

Explore the lush trails of Kalpetta through Wayanad's stunning forests and spice plantations at your own pace.

🐘

Wildlife Safari

Visit the nearby Muthanga Wildlife Sanctuary and spot elephants, deer, and exotic birds in their natural habitat.

🎮

Terrace Games

Enjoy a friendly game of carrom on our sky terrace while soaking in breathtaking panoramic views of Kalpetta.

💧

Waterfall Trips

Chase the stunning waterfalls of Wayanad — Soochipara, Meenmutty, and Kanthanpara are all just a short drive away.

☕

Plantation Tours

Breathe in the rich aroma of cardamom, coffee, and tea on a guided tour through Wayanad's famous spice estates.

Honestly the best homestay experience I have ever had in Wayanad. The house is beautiful, the hosts are incredibly warm, and the location is absolutely stunning.
